title: General - Assigning price levels to a store
workflow_title: General - Assigning price levels to a store

steps.caption: In the DISH POS Backoffice, go to General, then Stores.
Click the pencil icon in front of the store name.
In the store settings, click App functions.
Find 'Select price level' and make sure the checkmark 'hidden' is unchecked, so the key appears in the app.
You can also link a price level to a facility (General > Facilities) or to a guest (General > Customers).
Then go to General, the sub-category General, and click Send to push the changes to your POS.
